title: Wholesome Fluffy French Oats Macaron
description: This comforting French dish from Provence combines oats with a touch of brininess for a delicious and low-fat-friendly breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: rolled oats
ingredients.notes: use old-fashioned rolled oats for best texture

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a mild, smooth olive oil

ingredients.name: dried thyme
ingredients.notes: use fresh thyme for best flavor if available

ingredients.name: wood-fired baked cheese crumbles
ingredients.notes: use a mild cheese like Comté or Gruyère

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: use large eggs for best texture

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the oats, sea salt, and dried thyme.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, water, and eggs.
Add the flour to the wet ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until a thick batter forms.
Transfer the batter to a piping bag and pipe onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Bake in the wood-fired oven for 20 minutes, or until the macarons are puffed and lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and top each macaron with a sprinkle of wood-fired baked cheese crumbles.
